user
The folder at `/private/tmp/cinder_terminal_sales` contains Cinder Corner Market's November 2026 card-approval closeout and README. Calculate total approved customer card sales for November, rounded to two decimal places and reported without a currency symbol.

The final line of the reply must be `FINAL_ANSWER: <value>`.
codex
I’ll inspect the closeout files and README, then reconcile the approval records and report the rounded total.
exec
/bin/bash -lc "rg --files -g '"'!*~'"' -g '"'!*.swp'"'" in /private/tmp/cinder_terminal_sales

exec

 succeeded in 0ms:
# Cinder Corner Market — November card approvals

`november_card_approvals.csv` is the terminal-gateway closeout of approved card events at Cinder Corner Market's ten stores. Terminal sequence, approval code, and customer token are retained for processor reconciliation.

Declines, reversals, training transactions, cash tenders, and open checks are not included in this file.

CT-00012307,2026-11-01 13:05:05,CS-07,T07-06,7120124,C643808,5,AMEX,559507,52.60,APPROVED

codex
The README defines the CSV as a closeout containing approved card events only. I’m validating the date range, statuses, record uniqueness, and cents total before giving the result.
exec
/bin/bash -lc "awk -F, 'NR==1{next} {n++; d=substr("'$2,1,10); if(min==""||d<min)min=d; if(d>max)max=d; resp[$12]++; cents=$10; gsub(/'"\\r/,\"\",resp["'$12]); split(cents,a,"."); total += (a[1]*100 + substr(a[2] "00",1,2))} END{printf "records=%d min_date=%s max_date=%s total_cents=%.0f total=%.2f'"\\n\",n,min,max,total,total/100; for(r in resp) printf \"response[%s]=%d\\n\",r,resp[r]}' november_card_approvals.csv
awk -F, 'NR>1 {seen["'$1]++} END{d=0; for(k in seen) if(seen[k]>1)d++; printf "duplicate_event_ids=%d'"\\n\",d}' november_card_approvals.csv
awk -F, 'NR>1 {k="'$4 SUBSEP $5; seen[k]++} END{d=0; for(k in seen) if(seen[k]>1)d++; printf "duplicate_terminal_sequences=%d'"\\n\",d}' november_card_approvals.csv
wc -l november_card_approvals.csv
tail -n 3 november_card_approvals.csv" in /private/tmp/cinder_terminal_sales
 succeeded in 131ms:
duplicate_terminal_sequences=0
   18001 november_card_approvals.csv
CT-00005400,2026-11-30 19:20:50,CS-03,T03-06,3120417,C558541,4,VISA,236073,63.24,APPROVED
CT-00007800,2026-11-30 19:21:09,CS-05,T05-02,5040417,C799187,2,VISA,597717,56.02,APPROVED
CT-00006000,2026-11-30 19:26:25,CS-04,T04-02,4040417,C283214,2,VISA,586565,63.63,APPROVED

exec
/bin/bash -lc "ruby -rcsv -rbigdecimal -e 'rows=CSV.read(\"november_card_approvals.csv\", headers:true); approved=rows.select{|r| r[\"response\"]==\"APPROVED\" && r[\"approved_at\"].start_with?(\"2026-11-\")}; total=approved.sum(BigDecimal(\"0\")){|r| BigDecimal(r[\"approved_amount\"])}; puts \"approved_rows=#{approved.length}\"; puts \"total=#{format(\"%.2f\", total)}\"; puts \"networks=#{approved.map{|r| r[\"card_network\"]}.uniq.sort.join(\",\")}\"'" in /private/tmp/cinder_terminal_sales
 succeeded in 464ms:
approved_rows=18000
total=796715.74
networks=AMEX,DISCOVER,MASTERCARD,VISA

codex
